confidence.rationale: Warnings exist but no manager intervention threshold fired.
promise_check reported schema or lifecycle errors.
Barrier 1 merged current Wikidata/Commons rows, including display-only image evidence. Dump-based recovery remains late-arrival work and is not part of this normalization cycle.

The unified status vocabulary used by ledger_append validation does not admit data-limited. M1.6 cycle 1 and cycle 2 both had to map to in-progress while the correct designation is data-limited (CWR-pair count 397/1000, climate-envelope value population 0/1000). Other clones (M1.4 megafauna ranges with redistribution-restricted sources, future M1.7/M1.8 partial ingests) will likely hit the same gap. Conductor decision needed: extend the vocabulary, or document the in-progress+rationale workaround as canonical.

Track 5 enrichment projection complete. Resolved-key Track 5 evidence projected from frozen Barrier 1 substrate; 23,524 resolved phyto+ethno rows, 28,733 compound-level bioactivity rows. Dr. Duke dominance is extreme (99.96 percent of edges; 87 families lost entirely and 4 demoted under Duke ablation); recorded as data-limited carry-forward against Track 5 falsification protocol, not as a halt condition. Sovereignty audit zero missing-required-field rows. No predictions, no chemodiversity_signature edges, no synonym renormalization, no paid APIs, no writes outside tracks/track5/.

Wave 2 Track 3 enrichment projection complete and tested. 209297 retained Track 3 candidate rows projected into per-(trait, accepted_taxon_key) membership table under tracks/track3/. No convergence_signature rows emitted (hard-asserted in build and pytest). Substrate read-only verified by mtime check. 12 of 15 canonical traits have non-zero retained edges. 9 of 12 canonical Track 3 validation cases reachable. 11 of 11 tests pass. Auditor must ratify before Barrier 2.
Track 4 data-limited enrichment regenerated, audit written, and focused tests pass; final validation remains for the auditor/conductor.

Post-merge worker integration completed; Barrier 2 conformance validator, machine-readable summary, and integration report were produced and locally checked. This is not auditor validation and does not promote Wave 2 enrichment to predictions.

Track 6 Wave 3 offline probe runner executed without paid, hosted, key-gated, remote, or live model calls. No local free/open model runtime plus model files were available, so results are benchmark-only deterministic controls: positive rubric control 210/210 pass, empty negative control 0/210, forbidden-overclaim negative control 0/210, and verbatim expected-answer diagnostic 90/210 exposing lexical scorer limits.

Track 2 Wave 4 held-out validation closure is generated over the frozen M3.T2 ranker and existing ablation scaffold. The result is a track-local null/data-limited validation outcome: 0 held-out cases validated, 1 pre-ablation validation-ready case falsified by singleton/source controls, 6 data-limited, and 1 insufficient-support.

Required report and merge report exist, branch citations are unique in the report, focused Track 5 tests pass, promise/org checks exit 0 with inherited warnings only, and master prediction/speculation ledgers remain header-only.

Built the Track 3 Convergence Pressure instrument from frozen Track 3 enrichment only. The instrument emits canonical trait CP scores, family-size and sampling-density null comparisons, a confound regression, canonical recovery diagnostics, a figure, a track-local convergence_predictions.tsv with evidence-vs-prediction row classes, and the required report. Focused Track 3 tests pass; auditor validation remains pending.

Built the Track 1 Reticulation Atlas instrument at current data-limited coverage: TCI is reproducible over 60000 accepted keys, hotspot diagnostics are emitted, pending-crosswalk seed evidence is preserved, and canonical polyploid recovery is explicitly data-limited.

Built Barrier 3 Atlas scaffold with 60,000 searchable taxon pages, evidence-vs-prediction bands, Track 2/4/5/6 prediction adapters, Track 1/3 contract placeholders, and counter-claim capture path. Global Barrier 3 remains open until sibling Track 1/3 integration is reconciled.
Next cycle brief advances Barrier 3 by requesting a combined instrument-to-Atlas readiness package and audit surface, while holding substrate, schema, instrument outputs, and master ledgers fixed.
A milestone has accumulated three or more active cycles since the latest terminal event without ledger evidence of a mechanism statement.
Track 3 Wave 4 validation/confound ablation package produced and validated locally; no master prediction/speculation ledger promotion.

Registered the exact Track 3 Wave 4 convergence/confound child milestone after post-merge plan repair. The package is track-local, tested, and not promoted to the master prediction/speculation ledgers.
The conditioning now asks for axis and cycle-kind fields. This is watch-only unless a stale milestone counter also fires.
Focused tests passed, figure check passed, occurrence/BIOCLIM/comparator TSVs quantify the two gating predicates, and master prediction/speculation ledgers remain header-only.
Focused branch and spanning integration tests passed, figure check passed, forbidden-claim scan for integration reports returned no matches, and master ledgers remain header-only.
Build script regenerated all requested Track 3 outputs, focused and existing Track 3 tests passed, and master prediction/speculation ledgers remained header-only before validator checks.
Merge report records the generated Track 3 artifacts, commands, validation outcomes, H3 decision, and merge guidance after the branch tests and validators passed.

Focused branch and integration tests passed, both branch figures passed figure check, and prediction/speculation ledgers remained header-only. This is worker-level post-merge integration, not audit-level validation.
Corrects the integration metadata timestamp to the session date while preserving the same tested integration result. Focused tests, figure checks, and ledger-boundary checks had passed.
periodic report artifact written by the harness
The conditioning now asks for axis and cycle-kind fields. This is watch-only unless a stale milestone counter also fires.
The closure integration test and existing Track 2/3 branch tests passed before registration; final validators are run after this append.

Auditor inspected the Track 2/3 closure integration report, reopen integration report, closure status table, root synthesis artifacts, branch TSV/JSON facts, figures, worker ledger event, and master ledgers; focused tests, figure checks, and validators passed with inherited warnings only.
Generated the final six-track free-tier status table, synthesis report, and figure; propagated statuses to root/reopen docs; focused tests, figure check, and ledgers passed before registration.

Auditor inspected the final six-track free-tier status TSV, synthesis report, generator/test, root and reopen report propagation, summary figure, worker ledger event, prediction/speculation ledgers, and focused tests; validators passed with inherited warnings only.
